title: Goldman Sachs Q1 2026 Earnings Highlights
text: Goldman Sachs reported first-quarter 2026 net revenues of $17.23 billion and net earnings of $5.63 billion for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Diluted earnings per common share were $17.55, and annualized return on average common shareholders' equity was 19.8%. Management described the quarter as very strong despite more volatile market conditions, noting that clients continued to rely on Goldman Sachs for execution and market insight. Global Banking & Markets produced record revenue of about $12.7 billion, supported by investment banking activity, equities trading, and financing. Equities revenue reached a record level, helped by strong client activity and financing demand. Asset & Wealth Management also benefited from higher management and other fees and continued growth in assets under supervision. The results show Goldman Sachs' ability to benefit from active capital markets, client flows, advisory work, trading, and asset management scale.
